<?php /** * ECParameters * * From: https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5915 * * PHP version 5 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2016 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://phpseclib.sourceforge.net */ namespace phpseclib3\File\ASN1\Maps; use phpseclib3\File\ASN1; /** * ECParameters * * ECParameters ::= CHOICE { * namedCurve OBJECT IDENTIFIER * -- implicitCurve NULL * -- specifiedCurve SpecifiedECDomain * } * -- implicitCurve and specifiedCurve MUST NOT be used in PKIX. * -- Details for SpecifiedECDomain can be found in [X9.62]. * -- Any future additions to this CHOICE should be coordinated * -- with ANSI X9. * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ abstract class ECParameters { const MAP = [ 'type' => ASN1::TYPE_CHOICE, 'children' => [ 'namedCurve' => ['type' => ASN1::TYPE_OBJECT_IDENTIFIER], 'implicitCurve' => ['type' => ASN1::TYPE_NULL], 'specifiedCurve' => SpecifiedECDomain::MAP ] ]; }
